title: Recreate agent: Code Reviewer (reports to Founding Engineer)
description:
\## Goal

Create a new agent with the exact name \`Code Reviewer\`, configured as a replacement for the current agent, and set reporting to \`Founding Engineer\` at creation time.



\## Preconditions

\- Old \`Code Reviewer\` agent is deactivated before this task starts.

\- No active agent exists with the name \`Code Reviewer\`.



\## Steps

1\. In Agents, create a new agent.

2\. Set exact agent name to \`Code Reviewer\`.

3\. Use same adapter type and config pattern as current review agents.

4\. Set \*\*Reports to\*\* \= \`Founding Engineer\` during creation.

5\. Set instructions path to \`agents/code-reviewer/AGENTS.md\`.

6\. Set working directory/cwd to \`/Users/tim/code/story-writing-app\`.

7\. Enable heartbeat using current team standard.

8\. Verify the new agent appears active and old one remains deactivated.



\## Acceptance Criteria

\- New active agent exists with exact name \`Code Reviewer\`.

\- \`chainOfCommand\` includes \`Founding Engineer\` above \`Code Reviewer\`.

\- Instructions path resolves to \`agents/code-reviewer/AGENTS.md\`.

\- No duplicate active \`Code Reviewer\` agent exists.

\- Add a completion comment with the new agent id/link.



\## Handoff

Assign to: CEO

title: Recreate agent: Founding Engineer (reports to CEO)
description:
\## Goal

Create a new agent with the exact name \`Founding Engineer\`, configured as a replacement for the terminated agent, and set reporting to \`CEO\` at creation time.



\## Preconditions

\- No active agent exists with the exact name \`Founding Engineer\`.

\- CEO agent is active.

\- Existing engineering agents (\`Code Monkey\`, \`Code Reviewer\`, \`Logs/Ops\`) are deactivated or ready to be pointed to the new Founding Engineer after creation.



\## Steps

1\. In Agents, create a new agent.

2\. Set exact agent name to \`Founding Engineer\`.

3\. Use the same adapter type/config family used by your engineering agents.

4\. Set \*\*Reports to\*\* \= \`CEO\` during creation.

5\. Set instructions path to \`agents/founding-engineer/AGENTS.md\`.

6\. Set working directory/cwd to \`/Users/tim/code/story-writing-app\`.

7\. Enable heartbeat using your current engineering standard.

8\. Verify the new Founding Engineer is active.

9\. Rewire direct reports:

   \- \`Code Monkey\` reports to \`Founding Engineer\`

   \- \`Code Reviewer\` reports to \`Founding Engineer\`

   \- \`Logs/Ops\` reports to \`Founding Engineer\`

10\. Confirm no old/terminated Founding Engineer instance is still receiving work.



\## Acceptance Criteria

\- New active agent exists with exact name \`Founding Engineer\`.

\- \`chainOfCommand\` for Founding Engineer includes \`CEO\`.

\- Instructions path resolves to \`agents/founding-engineer/AGENTS.md\`.

\- Engineering subtree is restored under Founding Engineer (\`Code Monkey\`, \`Code Reviewer\`, \`Logs/Ops\`).

\- Add completion comment with new agent id/link and confirmation of report rewiring.



\## Handoff

Assign to: CEO
